name: Magic Mouse
developer: Reed Mosby, Riley Shanley, Luke Fritz, Brian Fitzgerald, Nicholas Herink, Caraline Aldis, Karena Williams, Sam Fadare, Eric Bodreau
short_description: Magic Mouse is an action-adventure top-down dungeon crawl set in a fantasy world where the player fights their way through dangerous enemies, overcomes powerful bosses and survives perilous traps all
